abilities.description: Target opponent blights 2. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Target opponent blights 2. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: Blight

statics.description: As an additional cost to cast this spell, behold a Goblin and exile it. (Exile a Goblin you control or a Goblin card from your hand.)

triggers.description: When this creature leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to its owner's hand.
